    1. isDemo()

Interface App

All Superinterfaces:
Viewer
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractDemo, AbstractSimulationDemo, ArchitectureStabilityDemo, ArtsColorTheoryDemo, AudioViewerDemo, BioMotionDemo, CarTrafficDemo, ChemicalKineticsDemo, ChemicalReactionDemo, ChemicalStudio, CircuitSimulatorDemo, CivilizationApp, ClothSimulationDemo, CrystalStructureApp, CSGDemo, DigitalLogicDemo, DistributedClimateSimApp, DistributedCrisprApp, DistributedDataLakeApp, DistributedDnaFoldingApp, DistributedFluidSimApp, DistributedGeopoliticsApp, DistributedGridMonitorApp, DistributedMandelbrotApp, DistributedMolecularDynamicsApp, DistributedMonteCarloPiApp, DistributedNBodyApp, DistributedProteinFoldingApp, DistributedWaveSimApp, DistributedWhiteboardApp, DistributionsDemo, EarthquakeDemo, EconomicsGDPDemo, EconomicsMarketDemo, FeaturedAppBase, FluidDynamicsDemo, FormulaNotationDemo, FunctionExplorer2D3DDemo, GalaxyDemo, GaltonBoardDemo, GameOfLifeDemo, GeneticAlgorithmDemo, GeneticsDemo, GeographyGISDemo, GeometryBoardDemo, GeoscienceVoxelDemo, GlobalStabilityStudio, HistoryTimelineDemo, HumanBodyDemo, InterplanetaryTrajectoryDemo, KnowledgeNavigatorDemo, KurzweilDemo, LifeScienceStudio, LinguisticsWordFreqDemo, LorenzDemo, LorenzDemo, LotkaVolterraDemo, LSystemDemo, MagneticFieldDemo, MandelbrotDemo, MarketCrashApp, MatrixDemo, MechanicsDemo, MedicineVoxelDemo, MetamathDemo, MolecularViewerDemo, NewtonianMechanicsLabDemo, PandemicForecasterApp, PeriodicTableDemo, PeripheralsDemo, PhylogeneticTreeDemo, PoliticsVotingDemo, PsychologyReactionTestDemo, QuantumCircuitApp, QuantumCircuitDemo, RelativisticFlightDemo, ResistorColorCodeDemo, RigidBodyDemo, ScienceBrowser, SequenceAlignmentDemo, SmartGridApp, SociologyNetworkDemo, SolenoidMagneticFieldDemo, SpeciesBrowserDemo, SpinValveApp, SportsResultsDemo, StarSystemDemo, StellarSkyDemo, ThermodynamicsDemo, TitrationApp, UnitConverterDemo, VoxelVolumeDemo
public interface App extends Viewer
Provider interface for Demos and Applications. Distinguishes between educational demos and full applications.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    isDemo()
    Returns true if this is a Demo, false if it is a full App.

    • isDemo

      boolean isDemo()
